title: Citrusy Thai Toor Dal Stir-fry
description: A light and midnight-craving Thai dish featuring toor dal in a citrusy sauce that is keto-friendly.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Add sesame seeds and toast until fragrant.
Add garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Fold in Toor Dal with turmeric powder and stir-fry for an additional minute.
Add kaffir lime leaves and peppers; cook for about 1-2 minutes, until peppers begin to soften slightly.
Pour in the coconut milk and lemon juice. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and let it bubble for about 2-3 more minutes.
Reduce heat to low and stir in fish sauce. Let cook for an additional minute until the sauce is thickened slightly.
Remove from heat and add chopped cilantro. Toss everything together gently to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with extra lime wedges if desired.
